## Summary

Describe the public behavior changed and why.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm format:check`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test:coverage`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Provider contract changes link to current official documentation
- [ ] User-visible changes include a changeset

## Data and legal scope

- [ ] This change does not add restricted or personal-data integration.
- [ ] Provider identification, licence, and attribution requirements remain documented.
